Variables.Name: ReporterGraph
Variables.Description: Helper class to render 2d graphs on canvas

Functions.Name: K2_DrawLine
Functions.Description: Draws a line on the Canvas.

Params.Name: ScreenPositionA
Params.Description: Starting position of the line in screen space.

Params.Name: ScreenPositionB
Params.Description: Ending position of the line in screen space.

Params.Name: Thickness
Params.Description: How many pixels thick this line should be.

Params.Name: RenderColor
Params.Description: Color to render the line.

Functions.Name: K2_DrawTexture
Functions.Description: Draws a texture on the Canvas.

Params.Name: RenderTexture
Params.Description: Texture to use when rendering. If no texture is set then this will use the default white texture.

Params.Name: ScreenPosition
Params.Description: Screen space position to render the texture.

Params.Name: ScreenSize
Params.Description: Screen space size to render the texture.

Params.Name: CoordinatePosition
Params.Description: Normalized UV starting coordinate to use when rendering the texture.

Params.Name: CoordinateSize
Params.Description: Normalized UV size coordinate to use when rendering the texture.

Params.Name: RenderColor
Params.Description: Color to use when rendering the texture.

Params.Name: BlendMode
Params.Description: Blending mode to use when rendering the texture.

Params.Name: Rotation
Params.Description: Rotation, in degrees, to render the texture.

Params.Name: PivotPoint
Params.Description: Normalized pivot point to use when rotating the texture.

Functions.Name: K2_DrawMaterial
Functions.Description: Draws a material on the Canvas.

Params.Name: RenderMaterial
Params.Description: Material to use when rendering. Remember that only the emissive channel is able to be rendered as no lighting is performed when rendering to the Canvas.

Params.Name: ScreenPosition
Params.Description: Screen space position to render the texture.

Params.Name: ScreenSize
Params.Description: Screen space size to render the texture.

Params.Name: CoordinatePosition
Params.Description: Normalized UV starting coordinate to use when rendering the texture.

Params.Name: CoordinateSize
Params.Description: Normalized UV size coordinate to use when rendering the texture.

Params.Name: Rotation
Params.Description: Rotation, in degrees, to render the texture.

Params.Name: PivotPoint
Params.Description: Normalized pivot point to use when rotating the texture.

Params.Name: RenderFont
Params.Description: Font to use when rendering the text. If this is null, then a default engine font is used.

Params.Name: RenderText
Params.Description: Text to render on the Canvas.

Params.Name: ScreenPosition
Params.Description: Screen space position to render the text.

Params.Name: RenderColor
Params.Description: Color to render the text.

Params.Name: Kerning
Params.Description: Horizontal spacing adjustment to modify the spacing between each letter.

Params.Name: ShadowColor
Params.Description: Color to render the shadow of the text.

Params.Name: ShadowOffset
Params.Description: Pixel offset relative to the screen space position to render the shadow of the text.

Params.Name: bCentreX
Params.Description: If true, then interpret the screen space position X coordinate as the center of the rendered text.

Params.Name: bCentreY
Params.Description: If true, then interpret the screen space position Y coordinate as the center of the rendered text.

Params.Name: bOutlined
Params.Description: If true, then the text should be rendered with an outline.

Params.Name: OutlineColor
Params.Description: Color to render the outline for the text.

Functions.Name: K2_DrawBorder
Functions.Description: Draws a 3x3 grid border with tiled frame and tiled interior on the Canvas.

Params.Name: BorderTexture
Params.Description: Texture to use for border.

Params.Name: BackgroundTexture
Params.Description: Texture to use for border background.

Params.Name: LeftBorderTexture
Params.Description: Texture to use for the tiling left border.

Params.Name: RightBorderTexture
Params.Description: Texture to use for the tiling right border.

Params.Name: TopBorderTexture
Params.Description: Texture to use for the tiling top border.

Params.Name: BottomBorderTexture
Params.Description: Texture to use for the tiling bottom border.

Params.Name: ScreenPosition
Params.Description: Screen space position to render the texture.

Params.Name: ScreenSize
Params.Description: Screen space size to render the texture.

Params.Name: CoordinatePosition
Params.Description: Normalized UV starting coordinate to use when rendering the border texture.

Params.Name: CoordinateSize
Params.Description: Normalized UV size coordinate to use when rendering the border texture.

Params.Name: RenderColor
Params.Description: Color to tint the border.

Params.Name: BorderScale
Params.Description: Scale of the border.

Params.Name: BackgroundScale
Params.Description: Scale of the background.

Params.Name: Rotation
Params.Description: Rotation, in degrees, to render the texture.

Params.Name: PivotPoint
Params.Description: Normalized pivot point to use when rotating the texture.

Params.Name: CornerSize
Params.Description: Frame corner size in percent of frame texture (should be < 0.5f).

Functions.Name: K2_DrawBox
Functions.Description: Draws an unfilled box on the Canvas.

Params.Name: ScreenPosition
Params.Description: Screen space position to render the text.

Params.Name: ScreenSize
Params.Description: Screen space size to render the texture.

Params.Name: Thickness
Params.Description: How many pixels thick the box lines should be.

Functions.Name: K2_DrawTriangle
Functions.Description: Draws a set of triangles on the Canvas.

Params.Name: RenderTexture
Params.Description: Texture to use when rendering the triangles. If no texture is set, then the default white texture is used.

Params.Name: Triangles
Params.Description: Triangles to render.

Functions.Name: K2_DrawMaterialTriangle
Functions.Description: Draws a set of triangles on the Canvas.

Params.Name: RenderMaterial
Params.Description: Material to use when rendering. Remember that only the emissive channel is able to be rendered as no lighting is performed when rendering to the Canvas.

Params.Name: Triangles
Params.Description: Triangles to render.

Functions.Name: K2_DrawPolygon
Functions.Description: Draws a polygon on the Canvas.

Params.Name: RenderTexture
Params.Description: Texture to use when rendering the triangles. If no texture is set, then the default white texture is used.

Params.Name: ScreenPosition
Params.Description: Screen space position to render the text.

Params.Name: Radius
Params.Description: How large in pixels this polygon should be.

Params.Name: NumberOfSides
Params.Description: How many sides this polygon should have. This should be above or equal to three.

Params.Name: RenderColor
Params.Description: Color to tint the polygon.

Functions.Name: K2_Project
Functions.Description: Performs a projection of a world space coordinates using the projection matrix set up for the Canvas.

Params.Name: WorldLocation
Params.Description: World space location to project onto the Canvas rendering plane.

Return.Description: Returns a vector where X, Y defines a screen space position representing the world space location.

Functions.Name: K2_Deproject
Functions.Description: Performs a deprojection of a screen space coordinate using the projection matrix set up for the Canvas.

Params.Name: ScreenPosition
Params.Description: Screen space position to deproject to the World.

Params.Name: WorldOrigin
Params.Description: Vector which is the world position of the screen space position.

Params.Name: WorldDirection
Params.Description: Vector which can be used in a trace to determine what is "behind" the screen space position. Useful for object picking.

Functions.Name: K2_StrLen
Functions.Description: Returns the wrapped text size in screen space coordinates.

Params.Name: RenderFont
Params.Description: Font to use when determining the size of the text. If this is null, then a default engine font is used.

Params.Name: RenderText
Params.Description: Text to determine the size of.

Return.Description: Returns the screen space size of the text.

Functions.Name: K2_TextSize
Functions.Description: Returns the clipped text size in screen space coordinates.

Params.Name: RenderFont
Params.Description: Font to use when determining the size of the text. If this is null, then a default engine font is used.

Params.Name: RenderText
Params.Description: Text to determine the size of.

Params.Name: Scale
Params.Description: Scale of the font to use when determining the size of the text.

Return.Description: Returns the screen space size of the text.
